## Before Committing
- [ ] Tests pass: `%%TEST_CMD%%`
- [ ] No lint errors: `%%LINT_CMD%%`
- [ ] No type errors: `%%TYPE_CMD%%`
- [ ] No secrets in diff: `git diff --staged`

## What Requires Asking First
- Major architectural changes
- Changes to database schema
- Changes to public API contracts
- Anything that might break other developers' local setups
